concept: Unleashed by Netflix, Inc.: This action game allows players to participate in a series of mini-games directly inspired by the Squid Game series, such as Red Light, Green Light, Tug-of-War, and Glass Bridge. Each mini-game features unique core mechanics and rules, like moving only when the doll is singing in Red Light, Green Light, with immediate elimination for failure.
name: Squid Game: Unleashed
